label: User Caches
description: App caches under ~/Library/Caches. Apps rebuild these automatically; safe to clear when an app is quit.

label: User Logs
description: Diagnostic logs under ~/Library/Logs. Removing them only loses history.

label: Trash
description: Items already in your Trash (~/.Trash). Emptying frees the space for good.

label: Xcode DerivedData
description: Xcode build intermediates (~/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData). Rebuilt on next build.

label: iOS Device Support
description: Cached symbols for old iOS versions (~/Library/Developer/Xcode/iOS DeviceSupport). Re-downloaded when you connect a device.

label: npm Cache
description: npm's package cache (~/.npm/_cacache). Re-downloaded on next install.

label: Temp Files
description: Per-user temp files (%LOCALAPPDATA%\Temp and %TMP%). Safe to clear when apps are closed.

label: Thumbnail Cache
description: Explorer thumbnail/icon caches. Rebuilt automatically as you browse.

label: npm Cache
description: npm's package cache (%LOCALAPPDATA%\npm-cache). Re-downloaded on next install.
